Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 269

HIST255 African-American History, 1865 - Present (3 Credits)

An introductory course in the African-American experience in the United States from 1865 to the present. Topics include the aftermath of the Civil War on US race relations, the rise of segregation, northern migration, World War | and II, Civil Rights Movements, and the Black Power Movement.

Cross-listed with: AAAS255.

Credit Only Granted for. HIST255, AASP255, AAAS255 or AASP298A.
